definition: ROIC-WACC spread compression to 3.5-5.0pp creates convex rate sensitivity. At 4pp spread, a 100bp WACC increase destroys 25% of EVA vs 12.5% at 8pp spread, making the current S&P 500 approximately 2.5x more fragile to rate shocks than the 2017-19 period.
evidence: Mechanical math: at 4pp ROIC-WACC spread, 100bp WACC increase destroys 25% of EVA
Flagged as single strongest original claim in pair_0 debate
open_questions: Whether other frameworks validate the fragility finding
Whether AI capex ROIC realization alters spread dynamics
